name: marketpulse-ai
title: MarketPulse AI - Competitor & Price Intelligence
description: An AI-powered market intelligence agent that scrapes live competitor prices and web data, then uses LLMs to generate structured business insights and reports.

productQuery.title: Product / Market Query
productQuery.description: The product, service, or market you want to analyze (e.g. 'wireless headphones', 'project management SaaS')

maxResults.title: Max Results to Scrape
maxResults.description: Maximum number of products/results to scrape. Use 5 for testing (~$0.02), 20 for final demo (~$0.10).
